revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''urn:mrn:iala:dic:0901023e

On-the-job training (OJT) is training and familiarization at the VTS centre at which the person will be employed. It includes training on the purpose of the VTS, the VTS procedures, facilities and equipment used as well as the local geography and appropriate regulations and other procedures.

Source: 
IALA Guideline G1156 Recruitment, training and assessment of VTS Personnel
